claim: Consensus among disparate LLMs is 'cheap' and often reflects shared training bias (Consensus Poisoning).
The Leapfrog Mechanism's 23-minute to 3-minute re-entry reduction is an established fact.
Authentic human confusion is an un-forgeable signal of communication effectiveness.
The human operator should 'step away' from the screen once the swarm has the thread.
The v0.6 'diary of friction' (Institutional Trauma) should be removed to maintain a clean methodology.
